# Faqir Patterns Reference

7 patterns, each with its anatomy tree, variant table, and safe/unsafe transforms â€” all derived from the component manifest.

## auth-form

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Authentication form with login, register, and social auth options

```html
<div data-ui="auth-form" data-variant="login" data-size="md" data-state="default">
  <div data-ui="card">
    <div data-part="header">
      <h2 data-part="title">{title}</h2>
      <p data-part="description">{description}</p>
    </div>
    <div data-part="error" role="alert" hidden>{error_message}</div>
    <form data-part="form" aria-label="{form_label}">
      <div data-part="name-field">
        <label data-ui="label" for="{id}-name">Full name</label>
        <input data-ui="input" type="text" id="{id}-name" autocomplete="name">
      </div>
      <div data-part="email-field">
        <label data-ui="label" for="{id}-email">Email</label>
        <input data-ui="input" type="email" id="{id}-email" autocomplete="email">
      </div>
      <div data-part="password-field">
        <label data-ui="label" for="{id}-password">Password</label>
        <input data-ui="input" type="password" id="{id}-password" autocomplete="current-password">
      </div>
      <button data-ui="button" data-variant="primary" data-part="submit" type="submit">{submit_text}</button>
    </form>
    <div data-part="separator">
      <div data-ui="separator" role="separator"><span data-part="label">OR</span></div>
    </div>
    <div data-part="social">{social_buttons}</div>
    <div data-part="footer">{footer_content}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='auth-form']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  â€” Top area containing title and description
â”śâ”€ [data-part='title']  <h2>  required  â€” Form heading text
â”śâ”€ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  â€” Subheading text below the title
â”śâ”€ [data-part='form']  <form>  required  â€” The form element wrapping all fields
â”śâ”€ [data-part='email-field']  <div>  required  â€” Email label and input group
â”śâ”€ [data-part='password-field']  <div>  optional  â€” Password label and input group, hidden in forgot-password mode
â”śâ”€ [data-part='name-field']  <div>  optional  â€” Full name label and input group, visible only in register mode
â”śâ”€ [data-part='submit']  <button>  required  â€” Primary submit button
â”śâ”€ [data-part='social']  <div>  optional  â€” Social authentication buttons group
â”śâ”€ [data-part='separator']  <div>  optional  â€” Visual divider between form and social auth, typically with 'OR' label
â”śâ”€ [data-part='footer']  <div>  optional  â€” Bottom area with alternate action links (e.g. switch to register)
â””â”€ [data-part='error']  <div>  optional  â€” Error message area displayed above the form
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| mode | `login`, `register`, `forgot-password` | `login` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-mode-variant`, `change-size-variant`, `add-social-buttons`, `remove-social-section`, `add-error-message`, `change-title-text`, `change-description-text`, `add-forgot-password-link`, `customize-submit-text`, `add-terms-checkbox`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-form-element`, `remove-labels-from-inputs`, `remove-aria-attributes`, `remove-email-field`, `change-form-role`
- **A11y:** role=form Â· keys: Tab, Enter, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label or aria-labelledby on the form element`; `label[for] matching each input id`; `aria-invalid="true" on inputs in error state`; `aria-describedby pointing to error message when present`; `aria-busy="true" on form when in loading state`

## crud-table

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Data table with create, read, update, delete operations, search, and pagination

```html
<div data-ui="crud-table" data-state="default" data-variant="default">
  <div data-part="toolbar">...</div>
  <div data-part="table-wrapper">
    <div data-ui="table">...</div>
  </div>
  <div data-part="pagination">
    <div data-ui="pagination">...</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='crud-table']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='toolbar']  <div>  required  â€” Top bar containing search, filters, and primary actions
â”śâ”€ [data-part='search']  <div>  required  â€” Search input group for filtering table rows
â”śâ”€ [data-part='filters']  <div>  optional  â€” Active filter badges area
â”śâ”€ [data-part='actions']  <div>  optional  â€” Toolbar action buttons area
â”śâ”€ [data-part='create-button']  <button>  required  â€” Primary button to create a new record
â”śâ”€ [data-part='table-wrapper']  <div>  required  â€” Scrollable container for the data table
â”śâ”€ [data-part='table']  <div>  required  â€” Nested Faqir table component
â”śâ”€ [data-part='row-actions']  <div>  required  â€” Edit and delete action buttons per row
â”śâ”€ [data-part='edit-dialog']  <div>  required  â€” Dialog for creating or editing a record
â”śâ”€ [data-part='delete-dialog']  <div>  required  â€” Confirmation dialog for deleting a record
â”śâ”€ [data-part='pagination']  <div>  required  â€” Nested Faqir pagination component
â”śâ”€ [data-part='empty-state']  <div>  optional  â€” Shown when the table has no data
â””â”€ [data-part='bulk-actions']  <div>  optional  â€” Action bar shown when rows are selected
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| density | `compact`, `default`, `comfortable` | `default` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-density-variant`, `add-column`, `remove-column`, `add-filter-badge`, `remove-filter-badge`, `customize-row-actions`, `customize-edit-dialog-fields`, `change-pagination-size`, `restyle-toolbar-background`, `add-bulk-action`, `change-empty-state-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-table-semantics`, `remove-dialog-a11y`, `remove-search-label`, `remove-pagination`, `remove-row-action-labels`, `remove-delete-confirmation`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Enter/Space, Escape
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label on search input`; `aria-label on create button when icon-only`; `aria-label on row action buttons`; `Proper table semantics delegated to nested table component`; `Dialog a11y delegated to nested dialog components`

## dashboard-shell

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Application dashboard layout with sidebar navigation, header, and content area

```html
<div data-ui="dashboard-shell">
  <aside data-part="sidebar" data-state="expanded">
    <div data-part="logo">{logo}</div>
    <nav data-part="nav" aria-label="Main navigation">
      <a data-part="nav-item" aria-current="page">{item}</a>
    </nav>
  </aside>
  <header data-part="header">{header}</header>
  <main data-part="content">{content}</main>
  <footer data-part="footer">{footer}</footer>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='dashboard-shell']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='sidebar']  <aside>  required  â€” Collapsible sidebar containing logo, navigation, and user avatar
â”śâ”€ [data-part='nav']  <nav>  required  â€” Primary navigation container within the sidebar
â”śâ”€ [data-part='nav-item']  <a>  required  â€” Individual navigation link with optional icon and badge
â”śâ”€ [data-part='header']  <header>  required  â€” Top header bar with search, notifications, and user menu
â”śâ”€ [data-part='logo']  <div>  required  â€” Application logo displayed at the top of the sidebar
â”śâ”€ [data-part='search']  <div>  optional  â€” Search input area within the header
â”śâ”€ [data-part='user-menu']  <div>  optional  â€” User dropdown menu area in the header
â”śâ”€ [data-part='content']  <main>  required  â€” Main content area for dashboard pages
â””â”€ [data-part='footer']  <footer>  optional  â€” Optional footer at the bottom of the content area
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| sidebar-position | `left`, `right` | `left` | `data-variant` | root |
| sidebar-state | `expanded`, `collapsed` | `expanded` | `data-state` | sidebar |

- **Safe transforms:** `toggle-sidebar-state`, `change-sidebar-position`, `add-nav-item`, `remove-nav-item`, `add-footer`, `remove-footer`, `change-logo`, `restyle-sidebar-background`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-sidebar`, `remove-header`, `remove-content`, `remove-nav-role`, `flatten-layout`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Escape
- **Required ARIA:** `role="navigation" on nav`; `aria-label on nav`; `aria-current="page" on active nav-item`; `role="banner" on header`; `role="main" on content`

## document

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Full-page document container optimized for screen display and print output

```html
<article data-ui="document" data-format="a4" aria-label="{title}">
  <header data-part="header">{header}</header>
  <div data-part="body">{body}</div>
  <footer data-part="footer">{footer}</footer>
</article>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='document']  Â·  <article> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='header']  <header>  optional  â€” Document header â€” repeats on every printed page
â”śâ”€ [data-part='body']  <div>  required  â€” Main document content area
â””â”€ [data-part='footer']  <footer>  optional  â€” Document footer â€” repeats on every printed page
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| variant | `invoice`, `form`, `report` | `` | `data-variant` | root |
| format | `a4`, `letter` | `a4` | `data-format` | root |
| orientation | `portrait`, `landscape` | `portrait` | `data-orientation` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant`, `change-format`, `change-orientation`, `add-header`, `remove-header`, `add-footer`, `remove-footer`, `change-theme`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-body`, `remove-article-semantics`, `remove-aria-label`
- **Required ARIA:** `article element for document semantics`; `aria-label describing the document type and title`

## empty-state

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Placeholder display for empty content areas with icon, message, and action

```html
<div data-ui="empty-state" data-size="{size}">
  <div data-part="icon">{icon}</div>
  <h3 data-part="title">{title}</h3>
  <p data-part="description">{description}</p>
  <div data-part="action">
    <button data-ui="button" data-variant="primary">{action_label}</button>
  </div>
  <div data-part="secondary-action">
    <button data-ui="button" data-variant="ghost">{secondary_label}</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='empty-state']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='icon']  <div>  optional  â€” Decorative icon or illustration area
â”śâ”€ [data-part='title']  <h3>  required  â€” Primary heading communicating the empty state
â”śâ”€ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  â€” Supporting message with context or guidance
â”śâ”€ [data-part='action']  <div>  optional  â€” Primary call-to-action button slot
â””â”€ [data-part='secondary-action']  <div>  optional  â€” Optional secondary action or link
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `change-icon`, `change-title-text`, `change-description-text`, `change-action-button-variant`, `add-secondary-action`, `remove-secondary-action`, `remove-icon`, `restyle-background`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-title-slot`, `flatten-to-single-div`, `remove-action-without-alternative`
- **Required ARIA:** `role="status" on root when content changes dynamically`

## search-results

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Search interface with input, filtered results list, and pagination

```html
<div data-ui="search-results" data-variant="{layout}">
  <div data-part="search-input" role="search">
    <input data-ui="input" type="search" placeholder="Search..." aria-label="Search">
  </div>
  <div data-part="filters">
    <span data-ui="badge">{filter}</span>
  </div>
  <div data-part="results-header">
    <span data-part="results-count">{count} results</span>
    <div data-part="sort">
      <select data-ui="select">
        <option>Relevance</option>
        <option>Newest</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div data-part="results-list" aria-live="polite">
    <article data-part="result-item">
      <h3 data-part="result-title">{title}</h3>
      <p data-part="result-description">{description}</p>
      <div data-part="result-meta">{meta}</div>
    </article>
  </div>
  <div data-part="pagination">
    <div data-ui="pagination"></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='search-results']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='search-input']  <div>  required  â€” Search input container with search icon
â”śâ”€ [data-part='filters']  <div>  optional  â€” Filter badges or chips row
â”śâ”€ [data-part='results-header']  <div>  optional  â€” Header bar with count and sort controls
â”śâ”€ [data-part='results-count']  <span>  optional  â€” Text showing number of results found
â”śâ”€ [data-part='sort']  <div>  optional  â€” Sort control area
â”śâ”€ [data-part='results-list']  <div>  required  â€” Container for result items
â”śâ”€ [data-part='result-item']  <article>  optional  â€” Individual result entry
â”śâ”€ [data-part='result-title']  <h3>  optional  â€” Title of a single result
â”śâ”€ [data-part='result-description']  <p>  optional  â€” Description or excerpt of a single result
â”śâ”€ [data-part='result-meta']  <div>  optional  â€” Metadata area for a result (date, author, tags)
â”śâ”€ [data-part='pagination']  <div>  optional  â€” Pagination controls at the bottom
â”śâ”€ [data-part='empty-state']  <div>  optional  â€” Empty state shown when no results match
â””â”€ [data-part='loading']  <div>  optional  â€” Loading indicator overlay
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| layout | `list`, `grid` | `list` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-layout-variant`, `add-filters`, `remove-filters`, `change-sort-options`, `add-result-meta-fields`, `change-results-count-text`, `restyle-result-items`, `change-empty-state-content`, `add-pagination`, `remove-pagination`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-search-input`, `remove-results-list`, `remove-aria-live`, `remove-role-search`, `remove-aria-label-from-input`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter, Escape, Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="search" on search-input container or parent form`; `aria-label="Search" on search input`; `aria-live="polite" on results-list for dynamic updates`; `aria-busy="true" on results-list when loading`

## settings-page

_kind: pattern Â· category: composite_

Settings page with tabbed sections, form fields, and save/discard actions

```html
<div data-ui="settings-page" data-state="default" aria-labelledby="{id}-title">
  <div data-part="header">
    <h1 data-part="title" id="{id}-title">{title}</h1>
    <p data-part="description">{description}</p>
  </div>
  <div data-ui="tabs">{tabs}</div>
  <div data-part="actions">
    <button data-ui="button" data-part="discard-button" data-variant="outline">{discard}</button>
    <button data-ui="button" data-part="save-button" data-variant="primary">{save}</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='settings-page']  Â·  <div> Â· content: slots
â”śâ”€ [data-part='header']  <div>  required  â€” Page header area containing title and description
â”śâ”€ [data-part='title']  <h1>  required  â€” Page heading text
â”śâ”€ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  â€” Brief page description below the title
â”śâ”€ [data-ui='tabs']  <div>  required  â€” Tabs component for switching between settings sections
â”śâ”€ [data-part='section']  <div>  required  â€” Individual settings section, typically wrapped in a card
â”śâ”€ [data-part='section-title']  <h2>  required  â€” Heading for a settings section
â”śâ”€ [data-part='section-description']  <p>  optional  â€” Brief description for a settings section
â”śâ”€ [data-part='field-group']  <div>  required  â€” Label and input pair container within a section
â”śâ”€ [data-part='actions']  <div>  required  â€” Sticky action bar with save and discard buttons
â”śâ”€ [data-part='save-button']  <button>  required  â€” Primary save/submit button
â”śâ”€ [data-part='discard-button']  <button>  required  â€” Secondary discard/reset button
â””â”€ [data-part='confirm-dialog']  <div>  optional  â€” Unsaved changes confirmation dialog
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| layout | `vertical`, `horizontal` | `vertical` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-tab-section`, `remove-tab-section`, `add-field-group`, `remove-field-group`, `change-layout-variant`, `restyle-action-bar`, `change-section-title`, `add-section-description`, `swap-field-type`, `customize-confirm-dialog-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-actions-bar`, `remove-tabs`, `remove-confirm-dialog`, `remove-form-labels`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `flatten-sections`
- **A11y:** keys: Tab, Enter, Escape, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-labelledby on root pointing to title id`; `role="tablist" on tabs list`; `role="tab" on each tab trigger`; `role="tabpanel" on each tab panel`; `for attribute on labels pointing to input ids`; `aria-invalid on fields with errors`; `role="switch" on switch toggles`; `aria-checked on switch toggles`; `role="dialog" on confirm-dialog panel`; `aria-modal="true" on confirm-dialog panel`
